# TreeView

A compound component for displaying hierarchical data in a tree structure with expand/collapse functionality. Wraps Chakra UI's TreeView with composable sub-components for building interactive tree interfaces.

## Import

```jsx
import { TreeView } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Usage Pattern

This component uses a nested property pattern. Access sub-components as properties of the main component:

```jsx
<TreeView>
  <TreeView.Label />
  <TreeView.Tree>
    <TreeView.Node />
  </TreeView.Tree>
</TreeView>
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `TreeView` | Root container that manages the tree state and holds the collection. |
| `TreeView.Tree` | The tree container that wraps all nodes. |
| `TreeView.Branch` | A branch node that can contain child nodes. |
| `TreeView.BranchContent` | Content area of a branch that holds its children. |
| `TreeView.BranchControl` | Control area of a branch (icon, text, trigger). |
| `TreeView.BranchIndentGuide` | Visual indent guide line for nested levels. |
| `TreeView.BranchIndicator` | Expand/collapse indicator icon for a branch. |
| `TreeView.BranchText` | Text label of a branch node. |
| `TreeView.BranchTrigger` | Trigger element to expand or collapse a branch. |
| `TreeView.Item` | A leaf node with no children. |
| `TreeView.ItemIndicator` | Indicator element for a leaf item. |
| `TreeView.ItemText` | Text label of a leaf item. |
| `TreeView.Label` | Accessible label for the tree view. |
| `TreeView.Node` | A generic node used for declarative rendering of branches and leaves. |
| `TreeView.NodeCheckbox` | Checkbox for selectable nodes in the tree. |

## Props

### TreeView (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `collection` | `TreeCollection<T>` | - | The collection of tree nodes (required) |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md"` | `"md"` | The size of the component |
| `variant` | `"subtle" \| "solid"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant |
| `colorPalette` | `"gray" \| "red" \| "orange" \| "yellow" \| "green" \| "teal" \| "blue" \| "cyan" \| "purple" \| "pink"` | `"gray"` | The color palette of the component |
| `selectionMode` | `"single" \| "multiple"` | `"single"` | Whether the tree supports single or multiple selection |
| `expandOnClick` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether clicking on a branch should expand it |
| `defaultExpandedValue` | `string[]` | - | The initially expanded node ids |
| `expandedValue` | `string[]` | - | Controlled expanded node ids |
| `onExpandedChange` | `function` | - | Callback when expanded nodes change |
| `defaultSelectedValue` | `string[]` | - | The initially selected node ids |
| `selectedValue` | `string[]` | - | Controlled selected node ids |
| `onSelectionChange` | `function` | - | Callback when selection changes |
| `checkedValue` | `string[]` | - | Controlled checked node ids |
| `defaultCheckedValue` | `string[]` | - | The initially checked node ids |
| `onCheckedChange` | `function` | - | Callback when checked nodes change |
| `typeahead` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the tree supports typeahead search |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

### TreeView.Node

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `render` | `(props: NodeRenderProps) => ReactNode` | - | Render function for leaf nodes (required) |
| `renderBranch` | `(props: NodeRenderProps) => ReactNode` | - | Render function for branch nodes |
| `indentGuide` | `React.ReactElement` | - | Element to render as indent guide |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
import { createTreeCollection } from "@chakra-ui/react";

const collection = createTreeCollection({
  nodeToValue: (node) => node.id,
  nodeToString: (node) => node.name,
  rootNode: {
    id: "ROOT",
    name: "",
    children: [
      {
        id: "1",
        name: "Documents",
        children: [
          { id: "1.1", name: "report.pdf" },
          { id: "1.2", name: "notes.txt" },
        ],
      },
      {
        id: "2",
        name: "Images",
        children: [
          { id: "2.1", name: "photo.jpg" },
        ],
      },
      { id: "3", name: "readme.md" },
    ],
  },
});

<TreeView collection={collection} size="md">
  <TreeView.Label>File Explorer</TreeView.Label>
  <TreeView.Tree>
    <TreeView.Node
      indentGuide={<TreeView.BranchIndentGuide />}
      render={({ node }) => (
        <TreeView.Item>
          <TreeView.ItemText>{node.name}</TreeView.ItemText>
        </TreeView.Item>
      )}
      renderBranch={({ node }) => (
        <TreeView.BranchControl>
          <TreeView.BranchIndicator />
          <TreeView.BranchText>{node.name}</TreeView.BranchText>
        </TreeView.BranchControl>
      )}
    />
  </TreeView.Tree>
</TreeView>
```

### With Checkboxes

```jsx
<TreeView
  collection={collection}
  selectionMode="multiple"
  defaultExpandedValue={["1", "2"]}
>
  <TreeView.Label>Select Files</TreeView.Label>
  <TreeView.Tree>
    <TreeView.Node
      indentGuide={<TreeView.BranchIndentGuide />}
      render={({ node }) => (
        <TreeView.Item>
          <TreeView.NodeCheckbox />
          <TreeView.ItemText>{node.name}</TreeView.ItemText>
        </TreeView.Item>
      )}
      renderBranch={({ node }) => (
        <TreeView.BranchControl>
          <TreeView.BranchIndicator />
          <TreeView.NodeCheckbox />
          <TreeView.BranchText>{node.name}</TreeView.BranchText>
        </TreeView.BranchControl>
      )}
    />
  </TreeView.Tree>
</TreeView>
```

## Features

- Displays hierarchical data with expand/collapse functionality
- Supports single and multiple selection modes
- Supports checkboxes for selectable tree nodes
- Indent guide lines for visual nesting clarity
- Typeahead search for quick node navigation
- Supports controlled and uncontrolled usage
- Declarative rendering via `TreeViewNode` with render props
- Multiple sizes (`xs`, `sm`, `md`) and variants (`subtle`, `solid`)
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
